queries: Ford Motor F Q1 2026 earnings results

results.title: Ford Motor Q1 2026 Earnings Report
results.snippet: Ford Motor announced their Q1 2026 earnings on 4/29/2026. The report details EPS consensus of $0.22 and expected revenue of $43.36 billion.

results.title: Ford Motor Company Announces Details for Q1 2026 Earnings Conference Call
results.snippet: Ford Motor Company will release first-quarter 2026 financial results at 4:05 p.m. ET on April 29. A conference call hosted by CEO Jim Farley and CFO Sherry House will follow at 5:00 p.m. ET.

results.title: Reports & Filings
results.snippet: Ford Motor Company's investor site provides access to quarterly earnings releases, transcripts, and webcasts. Historical data covers multiple prior years with links for 2025 and earlier periods.

results.title: Investor Relations
results.snippet: Ford's investor relations page lists the First Quarter 2026 Earnings event for April 29, 2026. It also includes other upcoming events and financial resources.

results.title: Ford Motor Company Announces Details for Q1 2026 Earnings Conference Call
results.snippet: Ford Motor Company and Ford Credit will release Q1 2026 results on April 29 at 4:05 p.m. ET. Management will host a call at 5:00 p.m. ET to discuss financials and the Ford+ plan.

results.title: 2026 Ford Mustang Mach-E® SUV | Pricing, Photos, Specs ...
results.snippet: Discover the 2026 Ford Mustang Mach-E® SUV. Unleash electric power, sleek design, and impressive range for daily commutes and weekend escapes.

results.title: Exploring the 2026 Ford EV and Plug-In Hybrid Lineup
results.snippet: The 2026 Ford lineup features EVs and plug-in hybrids like the Escape PHEV with an estimated 37 miles of electric range for commuting and adventures.

results.title: New Hybrids, Electric Vehicles (EVs) & Plug-Ins
results.snippet: The 2026 Ford E-Transit Cargo Van offers a fully electric powertrain with an 89 kWh battery and is ready for work.

results.title: Why 2026 Ford EV Models Make Urban Driving Easier
results.snippet: Ford's 2026 EV models like the Explorer EV, Mustang EV, and Bronco EV deliver instant torque, smooth acceleration, and practical range ideal for city driving.

results.title: The Ford EV Lineup For 2026 Looks Like This...
results.snippet: Ford's 2026 electric lineup consists of the Mustang Mach-E starting at $37,795, F-150 Lightning, and E-Transit.

results.title: Analyst Calls Ford Stock A Buy. It Just Topped A Key Level.
results.snippet: UBS upgraded Ford stock to a buy rating, arguing that the automaker is on a credible path to earning more than $2 per share in 2027.

results.title: F Stock Forecast: Analyst Ratings, Predictions & Price Target 2026
results.snippet: 14 analysts have given F a consensus rating of Hold while the F price prediction in 2026 is $13.45.

results.title: Ford Motor (F) Stock Forecast and Price Target 2026
results.snippet: According to 17 analysts, the average twelve-month price target for Ford Motor is $13.66 with a consensus rating of Hold.

results.title: Ford Fell 19% in the Last 30 Days. Here's Where the Stock Could Go in 2026
results.snippet: Ford stock fell about 19% over the past 30 days and analysis suggests the stock could offer meaningful upside into 2026 with a valuation model target price of $17.

results.title: Ford misses on Q4 profit, analyst says 2026 outlook 'clears the bar'
results.snippet: Ford forecast full-year 2026 adjusted EBIT of $8 billion to $10 billion, which analysts say largely cleared the bar.
